# Weekly Development Schedule: New App Feature

### Overview
To ensure quality delivery of the new feature, this schedule focuses on iterative development cycles. Please read the morning briefing for the full sprint **update** before starting your tasks.

### Monday: Foundation & Planning
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 10:00 | Team Standup | **update** discussion of block risks |
| 10:00 - 12:00 | Backend Setup | Establish API endpoints |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 17:00 | Frontend Framework | Initialize React components |

### Tuesday: Core Implementation
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 11:00 | Database Design | Schema mapping for feature |
| 11:00 - 12:00 | Code Review | Check architecture diagrams |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 17:00 | Sprint Goal Work | Complete initial module code |

### Wednesday: Feature Development
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 12:00 | Logic Implementation | Core algorithm coding |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 15:00 | UI Integration | Connect backend data to views |
| 15:00 - 17:00 | System **update** | Push internal changes |

### Thursday: Testing Phase
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 12:00 | Unit Tests | Test individual functions |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 15:00 | Integration Test | Verify component interaction |
| 15:00 - 17:00 | Bug Triage | Log defects in the tracker |

### Friday: Review & Deployment Prep
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 11:00 | QA Session | Manual test run on staging |
| 11:00 - 12:00 | Performance Check | Measure latency metrics |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 16:00 | Deployment Prep | Prepare environment **update** files |
| 16:00 - 17:00 | Closing Meeting | Review weekly progress summary |<|im_end|>

final_answer:
# Weekly Development Schedule: New App Feature

### Overview
To ensure quality delivery of the new feature, this schedule focuses on iterative development cycles. Please read the morning briefing for the full sprint **update** before starting your tasks.

### Monday: Foundation & Planning
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 10:00 | Team Standup | **update** discussion of block risks |
| 10:00 - 12:00 | Backend Setup | Establish API endpoints |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 17:00 | Frontend Framework | Initialize React components |

### Tuesday: Core Implementation
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 11:00 | Database Design | Schema mapping for feature |
| 11:00 - 12:00 | Code Review | Check architecture diagrams |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 17:00 | Sprint Goal Work | Complete initial module code |

### Wednesday: Feature Development
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 12:00 | Logic Implementation | Core algorithm coding |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 15:00 | UI Integration | Connect backend data to views |
| 15:00 - 17:00 | System **update** | Push internal changes |

### Thursday: Testing Phase
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 12:00 | Unit Tests | Test individual functions |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 15:00 | Integration Test | Verify component interaction |
| 15:00 - 17:00 | Bug Triage | Log defects in the tracker |

### Friday: Review & Deployment Prep
| Time | Activity | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 09:00 - 11:00 | QA Session | Manual test run on staging |
| 11:00 - 12:00 | Performance Check | Measure latency metrics |
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Lunch Break | — |
| 13:00 - 16:00 | Deployment Prep | Prepare environment **update** files |
| 16:00 - 17:00 | Closing Meeting | Review weekly progress summary |<|im_end|>
